blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,602 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
